theater_description: Built-up urban battle inside Berlin after Soviet forces reached the city and before final capitulation.
geometry_method_note: Episode begins when Beevor places the major Soviet assault on Berlin on 23 April and ends with the city's surrender on 2 May.
military_area_note: German defender strength is city-bound, but the cited 1.5 million Soviet figure likely captures the wider Berlin assault/investment force rather than only troops physically inside the dense urban core.
civilian_area_note: Civilian denominator is limited to Berlin's own early-April population and excludes wider refugee populations in Brandenburg or Germany.
split_reason: Single bounded city battle; no better-supported internal split with clearly different denominators was found.
quality_note: Civilian population and defender strength are supportable, but reliable city-bounded direct civilian and combatant death counts are not.
